data.raceName: DOWNLOAD BET NATION APP 5TH GRADE HT3
data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. COMPLEX THINKING has been beaten for early speed lately, last time finishing fourth (22.17) in a Grade 5 at this track. Should bounce back. 2. HARA'S SCARLET has been a little hard to follow, finishing out of the placings latest but was in winning form two back scoring in a Restricted WIN at this track. This looks easier and expected to improve sharply. 3. TAKE AIM has missed the frame at his last two but did run well three back when second (25.53) in a Grade 5 at Shepparton. Can improve sharply here. 7. GEORGE JETSON returns here as an each-way chance.","runners":[1,2,3,7],"exclusive":false}
